// about me

mori

bug hunter | pentester

Starting from scratch — 1 bounties, no certifications, no experience on paper. This page tracks the journey honestly. Focused on web security and manual testing: logic bugs, broken access control, IDOR. AI red teaming is next.

I'm documenting everything as it happens — the slow parts, the dead ends, and eventually the wins. You can follow that story on the journey page.

Come back later and watch the numbers move.

Outside security: anime, manga, gaming.
